qa_pairs.question: Where should a User-Defined Function (UDF) file be located on an Alliance cluster when preparing for an Ansys Fluent simulation?
qa_pairs.answer: A User-Defined Function (UDF) file should be placed in the same directory as your journal, case, and data files on an Alliance cluster for an Ansys Fluent simulation.

qa_pairs.question: What critical check should be performed on the `.cas` file regarding User-Defined Functions (UDFs) before uploading it to the Alliance for an Ansys Fluent job?
qa_pairs.answer: Before uploading your Ansys Fluent `.cas` file to the Alliance, you must verify that neither the Interpreted UDFs Dialog Box nor the UDF Library Manager Dialog Box are configured to use any UDF. This ensures that the journal file commands maintain full control over the UDFs when the jobs are submitted.
